creator: lists.dan@gmail.com
text:
I just put another FreeBSD 10.1 system in production and it crashed in just over a day.  Why isn't the FreeBSD community complaining morr about this?   Even a moderate load and FreeBSD 10.1 crashes.   I'm not doing anything fancy on this new box, it is just a DNS server.   If this doesn't get fixed I will be forced by my company to switch to Linux.

Unread portion of the kernel message buffer:
